postReview.title: MLS: Hat-trick de Musovski derrota a Kansas City, Charlotte supera a NYRB
postReview.description: Los Seattle Sounders fortalecieron su posición en los playoffs de la Conferencia Oeste mientras que Charlotte FC subió en el Este.

postReview.title: MLS: La tripletta di Musovski abbatte Kansas City, Charlotte supera NYRB
postReview.description: I Seattle Sounders hanno rafforzato la loro posizione nei playoff nella Western Conference mentre Charlotte FC è salita nell'Est.

postReview.title: MLS: Hat-trick de Musovski derrota Kansas City, Charlotte vence NYRB
postReview.description: O Seattle Sounders fortaleceu sua posição nos playoffs da Conferência Oeste enquanto o Charlotte FC subiu no Leste.

postReview.title: MLS: Musovski hat-trick downs Kansas City, Charlotte edge past NYRB
postReview.description: The Seattle Sounders strengthened their playoff position in the Western Conference while Charlotte FC moved up in the East.

postReview.title: MLS : Le triplé de Musovski abat Kansas City, Charlotte dépasse de justesse NYRB
postReview.description: Les Seattle Sounders ont renforcé leur position en playoffs dans la Conférence Ouest tandis que Charlotte FC est monté dans l'Est.

postReview.title: MLS: Musovski-Hattrick bezwingt Kansas City, Charlotte knapp gegen NYRB
postReview.description: Die Seattle Sounders stärkten ihre Playoff-Position in der Western Conference, während Charlotte FC im Osten aufstieg.

postReview.title: MLS: ثلاثية موسوفسكي تسقط كانساس سيتي، وتشارلوت تتخطى NYRB

QAData.question: Who won between Seattle Sounders FC and Sporting Kansas City on Mon, 25 Aug 2025 01:15:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Seattle Sounders FC won 5–2 over Sporting Kansas City on Mon, 25 Aug 2025 01:15:00 GMT.
